body:
Parent issue: #72

Stage: task-timeout-policy

## Task

Implement the GitHub-timeout-only first pass for agent task timeouts. Add an AGENT_TASK_TIMEOUT_POLICY JSON policy with a default_minutes value and route_overrides, mirroring the style of AGENT_ACCESS_POLICY and memory policy parsing. Add typed parser/validation in .agent/src/task-timeout-policy.ts and a resolver CLI such as .agent/src/cli/resolve-task-timeout.ts that reads AGENT_TASK_TIMEOUT_POLICY and ROUTE and outputs minutes. For every workflow step that uses ./.github/actions/run-agent-task, add a preceding timeout resolution step and set timeout-minutes from that resolver output on the actual run-agent-task step. Keep this as an outer GitHub Actions guard only; do not thread timeout into run.ts/runAcpx/acpx-adapter and do not claim typed timeout response handling. Update docs/configuration list to document AGENT_TASK_TIMEOUT_POLICY. Add regression tests for parser defaults, route overrides, invalid policies, docs coverage, and a workflow contract test that every run-agent-task step has timeout-minutes wired through the resolver. Preserve existing workflow behavior and avoid unrelated refactors.

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:72 stage:task-timeout-policy state:running parent_round:2 -->

agent planner selected child issue delegation: Issue #72 has explicit maintainer approval to implement the GitHub Actions timeout-first design, and no existing child issue was found for this parent. Delegate one child issue so the normal child orchestrator flow can implement, review, and fix as needed.

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-99/codex-25263827415`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/100

Implemented configurable GitHub Actions step timeouts for agent tasks: added AGENT_TASK_TIMEOUT_POLICY parsing and a resolver CLI, wired every run-agent-task workflow/template step through the resolver with timeout-minutes, documented the new policy, and added parser/CLI/workflow contract coverage. Verified with npm --prefix .agent run build, targeted node --test runs, and git diff --check.

title: Sub-orchestrator: task-timeout-policy
